caption: A woman with light brown skin and blond-highlighted hair styled in a high bun is seated in a recording studio. She wears a black t-shirt and black over-ear headphones. Positioned in front of her is a professional black microphone on a stand. Behind her, a white wall is accented by a vertical yellow stripe. To her left is a television screen displaying the name "Johnson" in red text above a blue graphic. To her right, a black wall features a logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" in red and white, accompanied by smaller text that reads "KL 11 logo goes here". In the bottom left corner of the screen, a circular logo reads "STUDIO PODCAST". Throughout the sequence, the woman remains in profile, looking toward the left and speaking, with subtle changes in her facial expression and mouth movements as she talks.
